notes: Recurring coined concepts/motifs identified from real corpus reading (2026-07-22 sample: atoms/tech_finance_burnout/overthinking, atoms/working_parents/mindfulness, atoms/corporate_managers/compassion_fatigue, atoms/corporate_managers/people_pleasing, atoms/first_responders/financial_anxiety, atoms/midlife_women/overthinking). Each concept must resolve to exactly one locked zh-CN rendering everywhere it recurs, per glossary_project.yaml.

concepts.role: named condition the character-study arc is structured around; appears in HOOK/STORY/REFLECTION/TAKEAWAY
end-state motif noun-phrase, distinct from the mechanism motifs below
named condition + behavior label used inside EXERCISE instructions as a quotable self-statement
financial hypervigilance motif; 'watcher' also recurs as an atom-shape name across other personas (anxiety/watcher) — do not conflate the shape name with this specific motif when locking translations
sustained computing metaphor for rumination running across 30 SCENE variants; anchor term is 循环/思维循环, peripheral jargon (CPU/threads/cores) may be softened per style_guide_zh_cn.yaml
working-parent mental-load motif in PIVOT reframes

english_forms: running sentiment analysis on their word choice
concepts.role: workplace self-monitoring/rumination motif; 复盘 is standard Mainland business-register term for post-event review, natural fit

known_gaps: This is a first-pass concept map from a targeted sample of 6 files across 5 personas, not a full-corpus census. Expand during Phase 4 production as new critical_recurring motifs surface in other persona pools (gen_alpha_students, gen_z_professionals, entrepreneurs, healthcare_rns, gen_x_sandwich, gen_z_student, nyc_executives, educators, millennial_women_professionals) — none of those were directly sampled for motif extraction in this pass.
